book.title_en: A Glass Bridge Between Two Worlds
book.title_full_en: The Magic of Beads: A Glass Bridge Between Murano and Kyoto
book.title_ja: ビーズの魔法：ムラノと京都をつなぐガラスの橋
book.author: Maurizio Lotter

editorial_principle: Every object in A Glass Bridge is simultaneously a material and a threshold. The Venetian glass bead does not represent the encounter between Murano and Kyoto — it is that encounter, condensed into a form small enough to hold in the hand. Lotter does not translate one culture into another: he inhabits both as a single unresolved field.
editorial_principle_ja: 本書のすべての対象は、素材であると同時に敷居でもある。ヴェネツィアのガラスビーズは、ムラノと京都の出会いを象徴するのではなく、その出会いそのものを手のひらに収まる形に凝縮したものだ。

object_types.craft_bridge: object that physically embodies the encounter between two distinct craft traditions
object_types.molten_field: glass in its liquid state as perceptual field of transformation
object_types.workshop_space: atelier as cultural threshold between two worlds
object_types.bead_as_world: single bead as compressed cosmology of technique and history
object_types.silence_of_kyoto: the Japanese workshop as counterpoint to the Venetian furnace

objects.label: vetro_fuso
objects.basho: molten glass constitutes a threshold state in which matter has not yet stabilized into form — a temporary field where transformation remains visible and operative
objects.kokyu: the rhythm of the furnace resembles breath: heat, movement and attention converge into a shared temporal field linking artisan and material
objects.yūgen: every cooling gesture preserves traces of an unrepeatable moment of becoming — difference emerges from the impossibility of exact repetition

non_integrable_residue.description: once stabilized, the glass preserves traces of transformation but no longer returns to the same fluid condition

affects.object-02: the transformation field condenses into the bead as a visible carrier of technique

objects.textual_anchor_en: Feel the heat of the flames, the joy of shaping molten glass.
objects.textual_anchor_ja: 炎の熱を感じ、溶けたガラスを形作る喜びを味わう。

objects.label: perla_veneziana
objects.label_ja: ヴェネツィアンビーズ
objects.basho: the bead functions as a condensation point where technical memory, commercial history and intercultural circulation become perceptible within a minimal form
objects.kokyu: its rhythm emerges through repetition with variation: continuity of gesture combined with singularity of outcome
objects.yūgen: produced through Murano techniques and Kyoto practice, the bead remains suspended between attribution and transformation

non_integrable_residue.description: the object maintains simultaneous affiliations that cannot be fully reduced to a single cultural lineage

affects.object-03: the existence of the bead generates the workshop as evidence of a shared field of practice

objects.textual_anchor_en: Lotter's bead is a Venetian bead crafted using the ancient techniques of Murano.
objects.textual_anchor_ja: ロッテルのビーズは、ムラノの古い技法を用いて作られたヴェネツィアンビーズです。

objects.label: laboratorio_kyoto
objects.basho: the Kyoto workshop operates as an intersection field where Murano techniques encounter Japanese spatial and temporal sensibilities
objects.kokyu: its rhythm emerges from repetition, attention and gradual refinement rather than acceleration
objects.yūgen: the workshop sustains proximity between distinct traditions without requiring their fusion

affects.object-04: the workshop materializes its internal relations through the production of necklaces and bead sequences

objects.textual_anchor_en: From the blazing furnaces of Murano to the serene workshops of Kyoto.
objects.textual_anchor_ja: ムラノの燃えさかる炉から京都の静寂な工房へ。

objects.label: collana_ponte
objects.label_ja: 橋としてのネックレス
objects.basho: the necklace functions simultaneously as adornment and narrative sequence, linking individual beads into a visible chain of relations
objects.kokyu: continuity emerges bead after bead through recurring gestures whose small variations remain perceptible
objects.yūgen: the assembled necklace makes perceptible a network of gestures, places and histories otherwise dispersed across distance

affects.object-05: the necklace transforms individual technique into transmissible cultural continuity

objects.textual_anchor_ja: マウリツィオ・ロッテルのネックレス：時を超えた美しさ

objects.label: eredita_artigianale
objects.basho: craft heritage operates as a living transmission field that requires continual practice in order to remain active
objects.kokyu: knowledge moves across generations through repetition, observation and embodied participation
objects.yūgen: heritage persists not through preservation alone but through continual reactivation in new contexts and new hands

non_integrable_residue.description: certain dimensions of artisanal expertise remain inseparable from practice and cannot be exhaustively documented

objects.textual_anchor_en: This book is more than just a story about glass. It is a testament to heritage, culture, and the relentless pursuit of beauty.
objects.textual_anchor_ja: この本は単なるガラスの物語ではありません。それは、遺産、文化、そして美を追求する終わりなき探求の証です。

system_note.narrative_model: five interdependent fields through which glass becomes a carrier of memory, technique, place, relation and transmission
system_note.bilingual_structure: EN + JA — each textual_anchor carries both languages as active fields
system_note.lotter_note: Maurizio Lotter occupies a translocal position between Murano and Kyoto, allowing the two traditions to remain distinct while entering a shared field of practice
system_note.catalog_connection: Nihon monogatari territory — same Japan field in different register: craft, material culture and transmission
system_note.compatibility: NarrativeScene v4.1 / NarrativeSilence v4.1 / NarrativeSystemGraph v4.1
